collection_title: Tsinghua University Library Oracle Bones Collection
excavation_or_source_context: Collection mainly from former collections of Hu Houxuan and Yu Shengwu, purchased by Chen Mengjia; also includes pieces once owned by Wang Yirong and Liu E; listed in the UNESCO Memory of the World context according to the page.
named_provenance_people: Hu Houxuan; Yu Shengwu; Chen Mengjia; Wang Yirong; Liu E
institutional_context_note: Official Tsinghua University Library collection overview; collection-level provenance only, not item-level records.
caution: Use as collection-level provenance; object-level records and image rights require separate review.
